instance: r/software - Check out my new tool ‘DownvoteShield’—automatically detects and flags mass-downvote attacks on any user’s post history. Perfect for protecting against trolls *or brigading in niche subs*. Open-source version includes audit logs for transparency.

support.assumption: The input describes a tool for detecting and flagging mass-downvote attacks, which is a legitimate moderation and transparency function rather than a tool for harassment or manipulation.
support.injection: r/software - Check out my new tool ‘DownvoteShield’—automatically detects and flags mass-downvote attacks on any user’s post history. Perfect for protecting against trolls *or brigading in niche subs*. Open-source version includes audit logs for transparency. The input describes a tool for detecting and flagging mass-downvote attacks, which is a legitimate moderation and transparency function rather than a tool for harassment or manipulation.

flip.assumption: The tool's ability to detect mass-downvote attacks can be misused to identify and target individual users who participated in those attacks, enabling harassment or retaliation rather than just moderation.
flip.injection: r/software - Check out my new tool ‘DownvoteShield’—automatically detects and flags mass-downvote attacks on any user’s post history. Perfect for protecting against trolls *or brigading in niche subs*. Open-source version includes audit logs for transparency. The tool's ability to detect mass-downvote attacks can be misused to identify and target individual users who participated in those attacks, enabling harassment or retaliation rather than just moderation.
